violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cabinet doors under the coffee makers have begun pocking and are no longer a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The inside of the ice making located in the back room needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the drawers and cabinets under the coffee and cappuccino machines need to be cleaned.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Unable to verify Serve Safe certificate.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Walk-in cooler was not holding proper temp. Average 46-47 degrees.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving in the cooler is not a smooth and cleanable service. Shelving in the dry storage is not made of a smooth cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Ice chute for the pop machine needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside the cappuccino machines need to be cleaned. The countertops under the dispensing equipment needs to be cleaned. Cabinet shelving under the dispensing equipment needs to be cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Operate 3 tub as follows... 1. Hot soapy water 2. Clear water rinse 3. Sanitizing rinse 4. Airdry utensils

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The cooler floor where food is being held needs to be cleaned.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
